programme.title: Imigrante
programme.desc: 1921. gads. Nevainīga imigrante ar viltu tiek iemānīta burlesku un vodeviļas pasaulē, līdz kāds žilbinošs burvju mākslinieks mēģina viņu glābt un palīdz atrast sievietes māsu, kas tiek turēta karantīnā Elisa salā.

programme.title: Iesācēja
programme.desc: Studente Aleksa vēlas būt pirmā it visā. Viņa piesakās universitātes airēšanas komandā, un pavisam drīz viņai rodas iespēja pārbaudīt savas fiziskās un psiholoģiskās spējas.

programme.title: Pārdozēšana
programme.desc: Filmas notikumi seko Sārai, Tulūzas narkotiku apkarošanas grupas vadītājai, un Ričardam, vietējās kriminālpolicijas bosam. Sāra spiesta sadarboties ar Ričardu, lai apturētu metamfetamīna tirgošanu starp Spāniju un Franciju un atrastu slepkavu, kas saistīts ar šo lietu.

programme.title: Absolūtā patiesība
programme.desc: 17 gadus vecais Maiks Lesiters apsūdzēts sava turīgā tēva slepkavībā. Lai gan pierādījumi pret apsūdzēto ir šķietami neapgāžami, viņa aizstāvības advokāts Ričards Remzijs gatavs darīt visu, lai Maiku attaisnotu. Ar jaunās advokātes Dženelas palīdzību viņš dara visu iespējamo, lai noskaidrotu, kas īsti notika slepkavības dienā.

programme.title: Eliots: pats mazākais ziemeļbriedis
programme.desc: Eliots ir mazs zirdziņš, kuram ir ļoti liels sapnis, - ieņemt godpilno vietu Ziemassvētku vecīša ziemeļbriežu pajūgā, lai dāvātu bērniem prieku svētkos. Pēc tam kad Ziemassvētku vecītis nāk klajā ar paziņojumu, ka tūlīt dosies pensijā, mazajam Eliotam atliek vien tikai trīs dienas, lai pieradītu pārējiem, ka viņš ir šī goda cienīgs, neskatoties uz to, ka viņam nav atbilstošu ragu. Ja kaut ko ļoti vēlies no visas sirds, tad brīnumi notiek, vai ne?

programme.title: Kā Grinčs nozaga Ziemassvētkus
programme.desc: Vūvila ir maza, brīnumaina pilsētiņa, kas atrodas sniegpārsliņā. Visiem Vūvivas iedzīvotājiem ļoti patīk Ziemassvētki. Taču pilsētiņas tuvumā mīt Grinčs – ļoti nejauks radījums, kuram riebjas gan Ziemassvētki, gan arī vūvilieši, jo tie savulaik viņu izstūmuši no sava vidus. Redzot, kā viņi priecājas un gaida svētkus, Grinčs nolemj nozagt visas Ziemassvētku dāvanas. Bet varbūt kādai mazai meitenītei izdosies sadraudzēties ar Grinču un likt viņam mainīt savus plānus?

programme.title: Lemāna-66: Lielais izaicinājums
programme.desc: Filmas sižets balstīts patiesos notikumus un atgādina par autosporta vēstures spriedzes pilnām lapaspusēm. Notikumi risinās 60. gados, kad konstruktoru grupa, kuru vadīja Kerols Šelbijs, kopā ar britu sacīkšu braucēju Kenu Mailsu uzbūvēja vēl nebijušu "Ford" sporta automašīnu un meta izaicinājumu Lemānas 24 stundu sacīkšu favorītam "Ferrari".

programme.title: Dogmens
programme.desc: Kad uzticīgais policijas suns un viņa saimnieks dežūras laikā gūst ievainojumus, ārsti paveic dzīvību glābjošu operāciju, un no viņiem abiem top viens - atjautīgais Dogmens! Viņš dod svinīgo policista zvērestu aizsargāt un kalpot. Tikko Dogmens sāk pildīt policista uzdevumus un cenšas atstāt labu iespaidu uz priekšnieku, viņam tiek sarežģīts uzdevums - jāaptur superļaundara kaķa Pītija varenais plāns.

programme.title: Vēl pa vienai
programme.desc: Oskarotā Tomasa Vinterberga filma par četriem draugiem un kolēģiem, ģimnāzijas skolotājiem. Visi četri cīnās ar nemotivētiem skolēniem un jūtas iestrēguši rutīnā. Nikolaja 40 gadu jubilejā draugu sarunas noved pie norvēģu psihiatra Finna Skorderuda teorijas, ka cilvēks dzīvo ar 0,05 promiļu iztrūkumu. Četrotne nolemj veikt eksperimentu un pārbaudīt šo teoriju dzīvē. Tomēr, eksperimentam turpinoties, vīri sastopas katrs ar savu personīgās dzīves izaicinājumu.

programme.title: Kā pieradināt pūķi
programme.desc: Skarbajā Berkas salā vikingi un pūķi ir bijuši ienaidnieki paaudžu paaudzēs. Šeit dzīvo Hikaps - jaunietis ar izgudrotāja spējām, varenā vikinga Lielā Stoika dēls. Hikaps pārkāpj gadsimtiem ilgas tradīcijas, sadraudzējoties ar Nezobu - mītiem apvīto Tumsas pūķi. Viņu neticamā draudzība atklās pūķu patieso dabu un pavērs ceļu jaunai ērai pūķu un vikingu pasaulē.

programme.title: Ledus laikmets: Lielā sadursme
programme.desc: Skreta (Kriss Vedžs) nepārtrauktie pūliņi noglabāt savu zīli, liek viņam izraisīt negadījumu virkni, kuru rezultātā asteroīdi sāk traukties uz Zemi. Haoss liek Manijam (Rejs Romano), Djego (Deniss Līrijs), Sidam (Džons Legvizamo) un viņu ģimenēm meklēt patvērumu. Piedzīvojumu meklētāja zebiekste Baks (Saimons Pegs) viņus brīdina, ka var sākties masveida izmiršana, kas liek draugiem meklēt jaunu mājvietu, pa ceļam satiekot citus dzīvniekus un apmeklējot eksotiskas vietas.

programme.title: Moslija slepenais spēks
programme.desc: Kādā dīvainā valstī mīt ziloņiem līdzīgi zvēri ar gariem snuķiem. Dienu no dienas lempīgais Moslijs strādā smagu darbu, vilkdams arklu un ardams zemi. Moslija grūto ikdienu gaišāku padara tikai viņa mazais dēliņš Rū. Kādu dienu klejodams pa laukiem, Rū atklāj senu, noslēpumainu alu ar dīvainiem zīmējumiem uz sienām. Šķiet, ka tajos ir attēloti tādi paši ziloņi kā viņš pats, taču ir viena atšķirība. Uz akmeņiem uzzīmētie ziloņi stāv uz pakaļkājām, un tie sniedzas pret debesīm nevis ar ziloņa nagiem, bet gan ar rokām! Satrauktais Rū redzēto izstāsta savam tētim, un Moslijs atceras senu leģendu, kas vēsta, ka kādreiz ziloņi tiešām staigājuši stāvus! Atklājums neļauj Moslijam mierīgi dzīvot un viņš nolemj kopā ar Rū aizbēgt no fermas. Bēgdami no sava ļaunā saimnieka, Moslijs un Rū cer atrast noslēpumainu pilsētu, kurā joprojām dzīvo divkājaino ziloņu cilts.

programme.title: Juras laikmeta pasaule: Atdzimšana
programme.desc: Pieci gadi ir pagājuši kopš notikumiem filmā "Juras laikmeta pasaule: Valdīšana". Zemes ekosistēma ir skarba pret dinozauriem, un izdzīvojušie ir spiesti slēpties tropu reģionā pie ekvatora, kur valda viņiem piemērots klimats. Taču trīs varenākās sugas – uz zemes, jūrā un gaisā – sevī nes noslēpumu. To DNS var atklāt zāles, kas cilvēcei sniegs neiedomājamas, dzīvību glābjošas iespējas...

programme.title: Singstrīta
programme.desc: Dublina, 1985. gads. Ekonomiskā krīze Īrijā arvien vairāk cilvēku iedzen bankrotā, tikmēr 15 gadus vecais Konors kopā ar brāli un māsu dzīvo pie vecākiem, kuru laulībai draud izjukšana. Lai ietaupītu naudu, Konoram nākas mainīt skolu. Tur viņš ātri vien kļūst par izstumto. Kādu dienu viņš pamana Rafīnu, kura šad tad stāv iepretim skolai, raudzīdamās tālumā un smēķēdama vienu cigareti pēc otras. Viņa ir skaista, divus gadus vecāka par Konoru, viņai ir draugs, un viņa strādā par modeli. Īsāk sakot: viņa ir gandrīz nesasniedzama. Taču Konors nav gatavs padoties un piedāvā meitenei piedalīties viņa grupas videoklipā. Rafīna piekrīt, un Konors ir panikā, jo grupas viņam nemaz nav...

programme.title: Augstuma ķīlnieki
programme.desc: Pilots transportē maršali, kas pavada uz prāvu bēgli. Kad viņi šķērso Aļaskas savvaļu, pieaug spriedze un tiek pārbaudīta uzticība, jo ne visi lidmašīnā ir tie, par ko uzdodas.

programme.title: Viktorīnu lēdija
programme.desc: Anna ir gudra un aizrautīga televīzijas viktorīnu dalībniece. Kad viņas māte iekrīt pamatīgos parādos, Annai nākas apvienot spēkus ar māsu Dženiju, no kuras viņa laika gaitā atsvešinājusies. Situācija sarežģījas vēl vairāk, kad tiek nolaupīts Annas suns un par viņu pieprasīta izpirkuma maksa. Abām māsām neatliek nekas cits kā doties trakā ceļojumā pāri Amerikas Savienotajām Valstīm ar vienu mērķi: padarīt Annu par neapstrīdamu televīzijas viktorīnu čempioni, lai iegūtu tik ļoti nepieciešamo naudu!

programme.title: Misija: Izglābt tīģeri
programme.desc: Jauns supervaronis iedraudzējas ar apdraudētu tīģeri, ko sastapis piknika laikā mežā, un uzsāk drosmīgu glābšanas misiju.

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: Ziemassvētku brīvdienās dodoties uz Parīzi, Makkalisteru ģimene nejauši aizmirst mājās savu astoņgadīgo dēlu Kevinu. Tiesa, tas zēnam neliedz sarīkot pašam savas Ziemassvētku svinības. Beidzot viņu neviens vairs nekomandē, neierobežo un nepieskata! Viss būtu ideāli, ja vien rūdītie kramplauži Harijs un Mārvs nebūtu ieplānojuši apzagt visas tuvākās apkaimes mājas pašā svētku vakarā.

programme.title: Madagaskara
programme.desc: Iemīļotie animācijas filmas "Madagaskara" varoņi ir atgriezušies! Pingvīni, liekot lietā teju vai militāru precizitāti un visus iespējamos līdzekļus, ir saremontējuši vecu, reiz avarējušu lidmašīnu. Iecerēts, ka tieši tajā pazīstamie Madagaskaras varoņi dosies atpakaļ uz mājām - uz Ņujorku. Plāns ir labs, taču drīz vien Alekss, Mārtijs, Melmans, Glorija un pingvīnu komanda strauji piezemējas mežonīgajos Āfrikas plašumos, kur zoodārzā augusī četrotne pirmoreiz satiek savus sugas brāļus. Kāds no viņiem šeit atradīs savus radus, citam būs romantiski piedzīvojumi, bet nav gan zināms, vai Āfrika būs labāka par viņu mājām Centrālparka zoodārzā...

programme.title: Marmelāde
programme.desc: Filma par kādu ieslodzīto, kurš ar savu veiklo kameras biedru dalās paša izdomātā krāšņā, romantiskā bankas aplaupīšanas stāstā un izbēg, apvienojoties ar savas dzīves mīlestību.

programme.title: Snūpijs un Čārlijs Brauns: Riekstiņu filma
programme.desc: Čarlijs Brauns, Snūpijs un visi pārējie atgriežas ar šo aizkustinošo stāstu. Kad apkārtnē uz dzīvi apmetas jauna sarkanmataina meitene, Čārlijs Brauns viņā iemīlas. Viņš vairākkārt mēģina pievērst jaunās meitenes uzmanību un dažādos veidos mēģina savā dzīvē kaut ko sasniegt, taču katru reizi šķiet, ka neveicas arvien vairāk. Vai viņam izdosies iepatikties savai mīlestībai? Tajā pašā laikā Snūpijs apņemas tikt galā ar savu ļaunāko ienaidnieku - Sarkano Baronu.

programme.title: Mīluļu slepenā dzīve
programme.desc: Makss (Luiss Sīkejs) ir enerģisks un sajūsmināts Džeka Rasela terjers, kurš dzīvo Manhetenas dzīvoklī kopā ar īpašnieci Keitiju (Elija Kempere). Taču viņa laimīgā dzīve pārtrūkst, kad saimniece pieņem jaunu suni Grāfu (Ēriks Stounstrīts). Makss apņemas atgūt saimnieces uzmanību tikai sev un mēģina Grāfu atstāt kādā sānielā, taču viņus ielenc kaķu banda, kuru vada Ozons (Stīvs Kūgans). Viņi tik tikko izglābj savas dzīvības, kad nākas saskarties ar pamesto dzīvnieku armijas niknumu apburošā, bet psihiski nelīdzsvarotā truša Sniegapikas (Kevins Hārts) vadībā. Šis ir Ņujorkas piedzīvojums, kurš liek Maksam un Grāfam izvērtēt savu sacensību un mēģināt izjaukt Sniegapikas atriebes plānu pret visiem dzīvnieku īpašniekiem Ņujorkā.

programme.title: Viņš ir viņa
programme.desc: Ļoti brīva Šekspīra lugas "Divpadsmitā nakts" ekranizācija. Pārvācoties uz citu skolu, Viola maina arī savu izskatu un uzdodas par savu dvīņubrāli Sebastjanu, kurš pats pārcēlies uz Londonu. Taču meitene nemaz nenojauš, ka viņu gaida pārsteigums, – viņa iemīlēsies savā istabas biedrā un skolas karstākajā puisī Djūkā, kura sirds savukārt pieder skaistulei Olīvijai. Taču šī meitene ir pamanījusi Sebastjanu – emocionālo puisi, kādi viņai vienmēr patikuši. Un, kaut arī šķiet, ka nekas nevar būt vēl trakāk, ierodas īstais Sebastjans, kurš nemaz nenojauš, ka viņu aizvieto paša dvīņu māsa!

programme.title: Tusnīte
programme.desc: Trīs draudzeņu vidū Bjanka ir visatšķirīgākā – gandrīz neredzama. Pasniedzēji neatceras viņas vārdu, un skolasbiedri – nesveicina. Bjankai pašai liekas, ka viss ir kārtībā, bet bērnības draugs skolas smukulītis Vess atklāj, kāds ir meitenes patiesais statuss nežēlīgajā skolas hierarhijā. Pateicoties puisim, Bjanka nolemj mainīt dzīvi. Taču meitenes apņemšanos apdraud skolas skaistule Medisona, kuras nākotnes plānos ietilpst dalība kādā realitātes šovā, tāpēc jau laikus viņa iejūtas lomā, katru savas ikdienas soli dokumentējot ar mobilo telefonu un sociālajos tīklos audzējot "biezu ādu". Viņasprāt, tikai nejauks cilvēks var sasniegt panākumus.

programme.title: Megana 2.0
programme.desc: Nāvējoši bīstamā lelle ir atgriezusies, un šoreiz viņa nav viena. Pēc tam, kad mākslīgā intelekta brīnums M3GAN uzsāka slepkavīgu (un nevainojami horeogrāfisku) plosīšanos un tika iznīcināta, tās izgudrotāja Džemma ir kļuvusi par slavenu autori, bet Keidija - par pusaudzi. Tikmēr M3GAN pamatā esošā tehnoloģija ir nozagta, un ietekmīgi cilvēki to ir ļaunprātīgi izmantojuši, lai izveidotu militāra līmeņa ieroci, vārdā Amēlija. Lai apturētu Amēliju, talkā nāks neviens cits kā Megana.

programme.title: Sieviete pagalmā
programme.desc: Noslēpumaina sieviete atkārtoti parādās kādas ģimenes pagalmā, bieži atnesot biedējošus brīdinājumus un nepatīkamus vēstījumus, atstājot neziņā par pašas identitāti, motīviem un iespējamajām briesmām, ko viņa varētu izraisīt.

programme.title: Divas naktis seksam
programme.desc: Iespējams, ka vienas nakts sekss ar interneta sarakstē tikko iepazītu puisi nav tā labākā ideja. Bet sniega vētras dēļ iestrēgt ar viņu vienā dzīvoklī pirms pašiem Ziemassvētkiem – tas jau ir par daudz! Vai arī tā ir negaidīta iespēja labāk iepazīt vienam otru? Un pienācīgi atstrādāt šādas tādas kustības gultā?

programme.title: Bastīlijas diena
programme.desc: Straujajā un spraigajā trillerī Bastīlijas diena būs spiesti sadarboties divi pavisam dažādu jomu profesionāļi. Viens no viņiem ir CIP slepenais aģents, pieredzējis tik daudz, ka ar to pietiktu krietnam simtam parastu mirstīgo, otrs – nevainojami savu amatu apguvis kabatzaglis. No viņu sekmīgas sadarbības atkarīga speciālo dienestu aģenta turpmākā karjera, zagļa brīvība, miers visā Parīzē un pat stabilitāte pasaulē.

programme.title: After. Pēc kritiena
programme.desc: Tesa ir gatava jaunam dzīves posmam. Spožais prestižas koledžas diploms paver jaunas iespējas – meitene atrod sapņu darbu starptautiskā kompānijā. Viņas nodoms pārcelties uz Sietlu nemaz neiepriecina Hārdinu. Viņa neapmierinātība, pārmetumi un mūžīgā greizsirdība sāpīgi ievaino Tesu un rada bažas. Vai ir vērts visu likt uz kārts un upurēt daudzsološu karjeru? Taču kā lai aizmirst kopā pavadītās naktis un kaislīgos skūpstus, viņa ciešos vīrieša apskāvienus un tuvību, kas padara traku?

programme.title: Basketbols: Eirolīga. Real Madrid - Crvena Zvezda
programme.desc: The EuroLeague is the top-tier European professional basketball club competition since 2000. The competition replaced the FIBA EuroLeague (which was previously called the FIBA European Champions Cup, or simply the European Cup), which had been run by FIBA since 1958. Starting from 2010/2011 season the tournament is named Turkish Airlines Euroleague, due to a sponsorship contract of Turkish Airlines with EuroLeague, and in 2013 the contract was prolonged to 2020. The tournament is aired in 199 countries of the world. The current EuroLeague structure is made up of 16 teams, which each play each other twice, once at home and once away, in a double round robin league regular season, each team plays 30 games. The top 8 placed teams at the end of the regular season advance to playoffs, each plays a 5 game playoff series against a single opponent. The winners of each playoff series advance to the Final Four held in a predetermined city for two days. The Final Four features two semifinals, a third place game, and the championship game, all on the same weekend.

programme.title: Futbols: LaLiga. Barcelona - Espanyol
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera Division) is the mens top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda Division and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Futbols: LaLiga. Sevilla - Atletico Madrid
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera Division) is the mens top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Bundesliga. Hoffenheim - Dortmund
programme.desc: Germany has the most attended football league in the world, in the Bundesliga. We bring these authentic fab experiences to your living room with all the key moments of the 2019-20 season, to ensure that your appetite for German football is well and truly met. The likes of Borussia Dortmund and Bayern Munich are met with stern competition this season, as RB Leipzig look to build on their third-placed finish from last season. This programme brings all the games of the german top-flight into one place, so that you can easily catch up with the weeks action. As we reach the business end-of-the-season, watch the victors and losers dictate the final table. With relegation spots and Champions League places yet to be decided, it promises to be a rather exciting conclusion for all those concerned.

programme.title: UFC. Gilbert Burns-Mike Malott
programme.desc: Martial Arts based TV programme. UFC stands for the Ultimate Fighting Championship which is an American mixed martial arts (MMA) promotion company based in Las Vegas that is owned by William Morris Endeavour.The purpose of UFC fighting was to establish the most effective martial art in a contest that had no weight classes and minimal rules that were as follows: no biting, hair pulling, groin shots and eye gouging. Legendary fighters well known for their ability to win in UFC fighting are Anderson Silva, Brock Lesnar, Connor McGregor and Ken Shamrock. Womens MMA has seen Ronda Rousey defend her title from 2012 to 2015 before she was defeated by Holly Holm another belt holder in more than one martial art.

Inside Out
programme.desc: The seven-episode series follows Carmine, a real estate agent and interior designer, and Mike, a landscape designer, as they each pitch their design plans to clients. The budget is set, so the guys must be persuasive to score a bigger chunk of the dollars to either max out the interiors or make the most of the outdoor spruce up.

programme.title: The Renovator
programme.desc: Marcus Lemonis helps a father and his daughter with a home thats stuck in time after the loss of his wife. Marcus looks to free up space for new family memories.

programme.title: Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Follow an array of Hollywood superstars as they embark on an exciting and heart-warming mission, expressing their gratitude to the most important people in their lives by surprising them with huge and incredible home renovations. There to help them on their adventure are twin brothers Drew and Jonathan Scott. Some of the amazing people featured on the programme are Rebel Wilson, Bred Pitt, Jeremy Renner, Michael Buble, Allison Janney, LeAnn Rimes, Kevin Hart, and many others.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: An active couple is moving from Charleston, SC, to Pensacola Beach, FL. They want to spend their free time boating and riding jet skis, so theyre looking for a home with a boat dock just outside their back door.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but well prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. Well follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you dont have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfronts in USA, looking for homes that wont break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: House Hunters

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tareks picture-perfect wife, who Tareks friends still cant believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, well follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple from Powell, OH, wants to slow down and enjoy life on the water by buying a dream home on Indian Lake. They hope to find a house with open views of the water, a dock for their future boat and space for their dogs to play.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: With their six kids nearly all grown up, a Dayton couple is hoping to find a large lake house. Not only do they need a lot of bedrooms and baths, they also need yard space for their rescue dog Charlie.

programme.title: Sin City Rehab
programme.desc: Alison Victoria returns where her design career started to the bright lights and high stakes of Las Vegas! Shes betting on lofty rewards, taking on multi-million-dollar projects and risky flips as she looks to expand her successful design business.

programme.title: Vintage Flip

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: Home renovation expert and social media creator Jenn Todryk tears down the notion that major demolition is always necessary to create whole-home transformations. She combines clever design solutions and cost-saving ideas to create stunning home overhauls for clients in the Dallas-Fort Worth area—often without removing walls or tackling large-scale demo.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: When this widow purchased this house with her husband years ago, neither of them knew what life had in store. Now, she wants to fulfill her late husbands dream to transform their outdated house into a beautiful, modern farmhouse home. Dave and Jenny help bring that dream to life for the woman and her two teenage sons by incorporating one of their favorite pastimes, a karaoke cabinet in their den. They also create a cool, custom basketball court for the sons and a modern outdoor entertaining space where this single mom can gather with her family and friends for years to come.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: After some health scares left this young couple wondering if they would ever be able to grow their family, they are ecstatic to find out that mama is pregnant with another child. This means their young son is going to be a big brother. Dave and Jenny jump at the chance to transform this Tudor-style-leaning house into a full blown Cotswold cottage, but more open and hip for this young family. In the end, Dave and Jenny get to reveal this familys dream home... AND if they are having a baby boy or a baby girl.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Twin sisters Leslie Davis and Lyndsay Lamb have a knack for helping desperate homeowners sell their lifeless homes; the sisters make necessary, impactful renovations that convert unlovable houses into diamonds in the rough.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Twin sisters Leslie Davis and Lyndsay Lamb have a knack for helping desperate homeowners sell their lifeless homes; the sisters make necessary, impactful renovations that convert unlovable houses into diamonds in the rough.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Bargain Block follows home renovation experts and partners Keith Bynum and Evan Thomas on their journey to restore Detroits iconic American neighborhoods one house at a time. With sound advice and support from their friend—lifetime Detroit resident and real estate expert Shea Hicks-Whitfield, who is expecting her first child—Keith and Evan buy multiple rundown and abandoned houses on a single block, take them down to the studs, and create affordable, stylish and fully furnished starter homes that are ideal for first-time homebuyers. Now settled in the Motor City, the couple, who have renovated and purchased their own home and opened a new retail store and workshop, infuse every property with a functional layout, artful design and beautiful repurposed furniture. The end result is incredible transformations of dilapidated homes that are an inspiration to the entire neighborhood.

Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you dont have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfronts in USA, looking for homes that wont break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tareks picture-perfect wife, who Tareks friends still cant believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, well follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. Pawning was the leading form of consumer credit in the United States until the 1950s, and pawn shops are still helping everyday people make ends meet. "Pawn Stars" takes you inside the colorful world of the pawn business. At the Gold and Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and theres clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. Its up to them to determine whats real and whats fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyones mind, "Whats the story behind it?" and "Whats it worth?"

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: From the producers of Ancient Aliens® and The Curse of Oak Island® From alleged UFO encounters to sudden disappearances to evil possessions, series host William Shatner attempts to get to the truth behind the most bizarre and mysterious events ever reported. With the help of the worlds top scientists, first-hand "experiencer" accounts, and dramatic reenactments, viewers gain shocking insight into whats really happening--and why.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. Its up to them to determine whats real and whats fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyones mind, "Whats the story behind it?" and "Whats it worth?"

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Forged in Fire features world-class bladesmiths competing against each other to create some of the most iconic edged weapons from history. In each episode, four of the best bladesmiths in the country will come together to put both their skills and reputations on the line. Whether they are making a Japanese katana, a medieval broadsword, or an ancient throwing blade like the chakram, the weapons they forge will be fully functional and lethal works of art and war. The unique histories contained within each weapon will be creatively told during the forging process and the final weapons themselves will be assessed and ruthlessly tested by our panel of expert judges. These dynamic and explosive tests will be individually designed to push the weapons to their absolute limit. One by one, the bladesmiths will be eliminated until only one remains to be crowned the champion.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: The worlds most mysterious videos, photos, and audio recordings, and uses the best technology and experts to render a credible verdict. Each episode analyzes and passes verdicts on several seemingly impossible things "caught on film" including giant beasts, UFOS, apocalyptic sounds, hairy humans, alleged mutants from the deep, conspiracies, and many other cases. Host and veteran journalist Tony Harris takes nothing for granted in a quest for answers, tracking down eyewitnesses, putting each photo or film through a battery of tests, calling out the hoaxes, and highlighting the most credible evidence in an attempt to better understand our world.

At the Gold and Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and theres clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. Its up to them to determine whats real and whats fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyones mind, "Whats the story behind it?" and "Whats it worth?"

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Origins
programme.desc: From ancient legends to biblical accounts, humanity has long been captivated by stories of sudden disappearances and missing time—journeys that seem to defy the very fabric of reality. Could these events be the earliest records of time travel?

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: There are men in America who must still make their living off the land; hunting and trapping to provide for their families. They are MOUNTAIN MEN. Their very survival is predicated on utilizing ancient skills perfected over hundreds of years. This series features a variety of men from Appalachia to the Rocky Mountains to Alaska and follows them as they race against winter to obtain the sustenance and money needed to make it through the coldest months of the year. Eustace Conway lives deep in the mountains of North Carolina on the "Turtle Bay Reserve." He moved here two decades ago in search of a more "truthful" existence. In the years since, hes built a home, and survived by hunting, fishing and raising animals. Tom Orr lives with his wife on the Yaak River in Montana. He is 100 miles from the nearest town, a place he hasnt ventured to in 10 years. John is a trapper by trade and to prepare for winter, he must earn enough money to obtain the supplies he needs. Marty Meierotto, his wife Dominique and their daughter Noah live in the small Alaskan town of Two Rivers. Every month, Marty pilots his bi-plane, traveling into the bush in search of the wolverine and lynx pelts he needs to make a living. While hes on the Black River, he must hunt moose and caribou to survive in the wilderness. Together, they represent Americas true MOUNTAIN MEN.

programme.title: The UnBelievable with Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: The world is full of strange and mind-bending places, but some take the cake. Explore an island ruled by deadly predators, or a mysterious paranormal hotspot thats a magnet for UFOs. These are the weirdest corners of the planet.

programme.title: Historys Deadliest with Ving Rhames
programme.desc: Rhames will bring his signature intensity and commanding presence to each episode, guiding viewers through the pivotal decisions, deadly chain reactions, and far-reaching consequences of these historic catastrophes.

programme.title: Greatest Mysteries with Laurence Fishburne
programme.desc: One of the most infamous pirates to prowl Americas Gulf Coast--Jean Lafitte--led what may have been the largest pirate fleet in the world. Known as "The Terror of the Gulf" he was more than a pirate... he was a crime boss, rich beyond belief, and just as ruthless. But the whereabouts of Jean Lafittes treasure remain unknown. The swamps and bayous were his base, and likely also his hiding place. But treasure hunters have found very little of Lafittes stash.

programme.title: Historys Deadliest with Ving Rhames
programme.desc: Rhames will bring his signature intensity and commanding presence to each episode, guiding viewers through the pivotal decisions, deadly chain reactions, and far-reaching consequences of these historic catastrophes.

programme.title: Greatest Mysteries with Laurence Fishburne
programme.desc: One of the most infamous pirates to prowl Americas Gulf Coast--Jean Lafitte--led what may have been the largest pirate fleet in the world. Known as "The Terror of the Gulf" he was more than a pirate... he was a crime boss, rich beyond belief, and just as ruthless. But the whereabouts of Jean Lafittes treasure remain unknown. The swamps and bayous were his base, and likely also his hiding place. But treasure hunters have found very little of Lafittes stash.

programme.title: Unidentified: Inside Americas UFO Investigation
programme.desc: In December of 2017, The New York Times published a stunning front-page expose about the Pentagons mysterious UFO program, the Advanced Aerospace Threat Identification Program (AATIP). Featuring an interview with a former military intelligence official and Special Agent In-Charge, Luis Elizondo, who confirmed the existence of the hidden government program, the controversial story was the focus of worldwide attention. Previously run by Elizondo, AATIP was created to research and investigate Unidentified Aerial Phenomena (UAP) including numerous videos of reported encounters, three of which were released to a shocked public in 2017. Elizondo resigned after expressing to the government that these UAPs could pose a major threat to our national security and not enough was being done to deal with them or address our potential vulnerabilities. Now, as a part of HISTORYs groundbreaking new six-part, one-hour limited series UNIDENTIFIED: INSIDE AMERICAS UFO INVESTIGATION, Elizondo is speaking out for the first time with Tom DeLonge, co-founder and President of To The Stars Academy of Arts and Science and Chris Mellon, former Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense and Intelligence, to expose a series of startling encounters and embark on fascinating new investigations that will urge the public to ask questions and look for answers. The series will reveal newly authenticated evidence and footage, interviews from eyewitnesses and former military personnel who have never spoken out before, and extensive breakthroughs in understanding the technology behind these unknown phenomena in our skies.

programme.title: The Universe
programme.desc: Every day, new information is discovered that helps us better understand how our Universe works. Some of this evidence solves mysteries dating back thousands of years. Some evidence offers new theories on how human civilization came into existence. In this season of The Universe: Ancient Mysteries Solved, well tackle mysteries such as an American Stonehenge built 500 years before Columbus, and how the Aztec Pyramids helped seal the downfall of the Mayan and Aztec empires. Well also look at some of the Roman Empires most iconic structures, and their connection to archeo-astronomy.

programme.title: Engineering Disasters
programme.desc: Engineering has built our modern world. Everything from skyscrapers to roads and air travel exist because of advances in engineering. What happens when engineering goes horribly wrong? Engineering Disasters goes beyond the headlines to uncover what really happened in the most notorious engineering accidents. What caused an outdoor stage to collapse in Indiana, killing seven? How did a collection of classic Corvettes disappear right out of thin air? Why did a planes fuselage rip open in mid-flight? What was behind the collapse of a domed stadium? Each hour long episode combines expert and eyewitness interviews, state of the art graphics and dramatic moment of disaster footage to tell the story behind the worlds most terrifying engineering disasters.

programme.title: Brad Meltzers Lost History
programme.desc: American history is vanishing one artifact at a time. Some of our most important historical and cultural treasures have been lost or stolen. Every year, dozens of treasures, from George Washingtons teeth to the Apollo 11 moon landing tapes to even the iconic ground zero flag from the September 11 attacks, vanish from the shelves of famous museums, government archives and private collections. Now, host Brad Meltzer leads the hunt to return these treasures to their rightful owners–the American people. Many lost artifacts are circulating on the black market, but dozens of previously lost objects have already been found—by ordinary citizens—in attics, at garage sales and even online. Brad will also enlist the help of viewers, giving the public the chance to help restore our history too.

programme.title: Unidentified: Inside Americas UFO Investigation

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Serial Killer Earth
programme.desc: In recent years the destructive power of natural disasters has been recorded, from Hurricane Katrina to the earthquake and tsunami that devastated Japan. Serial Killer Earth brings together a top team of experts to examine the most compelling footage from news and home video, as well as eyewitness testimony, in order to explain, understand and inform viewers of what actually happened during these disasters and how they compare and contrast with the most historic natural disasters of the past.

programme.title: Lost Gold of WW2
programme.desc: It is the last great mystery of WWII. The fabled Yamashita Treasure, a massive stash of gold bars and rubies worth billions, reportedly dumped in a cave by Japanese soldiers retreating from allied forces. While the fortune has become a legend, many experts claim there is no evidence it ever existed. Now, a dedicated group of investigators are resurrecting the dangerous search, using cutting-edge technology in pursuit of the truth, and unimaginable wealth.

Elizondo resigned after expressing to the government that these UAPs could pose a major threat to our national security and not enough was being done to deal with them or address our potential vulnerabilities. Now, as a part of HISTORYs groundbreaking new six-part, one-hour limited series UNIDENTIFIED: INSIDE AMERICAS UFO INVESTIGATION, Elizondo is speaking out for the first time with Tom DeLonge, co-founder and President of To The Stars Academy of Arts and Science and Chris Mellon, former Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense and Intelligence, to expose a series of startling encounters and embark on fascinating new investigations that will urge the public to ask questions and look for answers. The series will reveal newly authenticated evidence and footage, interviews from eyewitnesses and former military personnel who have never spoken out before, and extensive breakthroughs in understanding the technology behind these unknown phenomena in our skies.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Serial Killer Earth
programme.desc: In recent years the destructive power of natural disasters has been recorded, from Hurricane Katrina to the earthquake and tsunami that devastated Japan. Serial Killer Earth brings together a top team of experts to examine the most compelling footage from news and home video, as well as eyewitness testimony, in order to explain, understand and inform viewers of what actually happened during these disasters and how they compare and contrast with the most historic natural disasters of the past.

programme.title: Lost Gold of WW2
programme.desc: It is the last great mystery of WWII. The fabled Yamashita Treasure, a massive stash of gold bars and rubies worth billions, reportedly dumped in a cave by Japanese soldiers retreating from allied forces. While the fortune has become a legend, many experts claim there is no evidence it ever existed. Now, a dedicated group of investigators are resurrecting the dangerous search, using cutting-edge technology in pursuit of the truth, and unimaginable wealth.

programme.title: Unidentified: Inside Americas UFO Investigation
programme.desc: In December of 2017, The New York Times published a stunning front-page expose about the Pentagons mysterious UFO program, the Advanced Aerospace Threat Identification Program (AATIP). Featuring an interview with a former military intelligence official and Special Agent In-Charge, Luis Elizondo, who confirmed the existence of the hidden government program, the controversial story was the focus of worldwide attention. Previously run by Elizondo, AATIP was created to research and investigate Unidentified Aerial Phenomena (UAP) including numerous videos of reported encounters, three of which were released to a shocked public in 2017. Elizondo resigned after expressing to the government that these UAPs could pose a major threat to our national security and not enough was being done to deal with them or address our potential vulnerabilities. Now, as a part of HISTORYs groundbreaking new six-part, one-hour limited series UNIDENTIFIED: INSIDE AMERICAS UFO INVESTIGATION, Elizondo is speaking out for the first time with Tom DeLonge, co-founder and President of To The Stars Academy of Arts and Science and Chris Mellon, former Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense and Intelligence, to expose a series of startling encounters and embark on fascinating new investigations that will urge the public to ask questions and look for answers. The series will reveal newly authenticated evidence and footage, interviews from eyewitnesses and former military personnel who have never spoken out before, and extensive breakthroughs in understanding the technology behind these unknown phenomena in our skies.

programme.title: River Hunters
programme.desc: In River Hunters, Rick Edwards and river-searching expert Beau Ouimette visit some of the most historically significant sites across Britain: covering iconic events and battles including Roman Briton, the Wars of the Roses, the Reformation and the English Civil War. Their searches of these unexplored rivers and waterways unearth treasures from the past which reveal how our various ancestors used to live. As the artefacts surface from under layers of silt and rocks, the duo will meet with local archaeologists and historians to unearth the stories and people behind the finds. Spanning each rivers layered past, the new series will offer a fresh perspective and even redefine our history as we know it. Using state-of-the-art technology, archive maps and contemporaneous accounts from the period, Beau and Rick perform the first underwater archeological digs in some of the most exciting and iconic historical sites in Britain, often in dangerous and fast-flowing water.

programme.title: Clash of the Gods
programme.desc: Documentary series that in each episode explains the heroic and tragic life of various figures from Greek and Norse mythologies - the most powerful monsters, heroes and Gods, including Thor, Hercules, Beowulf, Minotaur, Odysseus and Zeus. Was ancient Greeces greatest hero Hercules a real person? What inspired the Minotaurs labyrinth? Did Odysseuss famous journey really happen? This series will answer these and many other questions, and experts will connect the myths we all know to actual historical events, and link the stories to mythologies of other cultures as well.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler
programme.desc: An FBI cold case that has laid dormant for 70 years leads a group of world-renown investigators on the ultimate manhunt to finally answer the question: Did Adolf Hitler survive World War II? In early 2014 the FBI declassified hundreds of confidential documents showing that Hitler may have not committed suicide but rather escaped to South America after the fall of Germany. A memo from J. Edgar Hoover himself states "American Army officials in Germany have not located Hitlers body nor is there any reliable source that will say definitely that Hitler is dead." Armed with the most cutting edge technology and these newly released FBI files the team will approach this case like a modern death claims investigation. Whether they are investigating a mysterious Nazi lair deep in the Argentinian jungle or diving for evidence of a missing U-Boat that could of shuttled Hitler to South America our team will focus on the tried and tested tenants for solving a fraudulent death case: follow the money where was the subject last seen, eyewitness reports, make contact with known associates and forensics.With declassified worldwide intelligence providing a wealth of new clues and modern technology never before available we reopen this world famous cold case in hopes of solving the mystery surrounding the demise of one of the biggest criminals of all time.

programme.title: Ancient Discoveries
programme.desc: Some of the strangest and deadliest weapons ever built were prototypes of the modern gun. ANCIENT DISCOVERIES finds out whether a simple bamboo tube could have been the worlds first gun. Hidden in an ancient manuscript lays a secret recipe for ancient tracer fire, but does it really work? How far and how high could the mega-mortar "Roaring Meg" have fired its shots to take out a Royalist stronghold? Can a team of experts discover the truth behind the bizarre battlefield phenomena of "wind of the cannonball," when men were seen to drop dead without apparently having been touched by a shot? And did a nine-barreled medieval volleygun mark the birth of the modern machine gun?

programme.title: Warriors
programme.desc: Former Green Berry Terry Schappert explores the stories of some of the most iconic warrior groups in history, including their weaponry, training, fighting tactics and more. The veteran investigates what made these legendary fighters great, but also what were their weaknesses. Join him as he looks into the battling masteries of the Vikings, the Samurai, the Spartans and more.

programme.title: The Best of MonsterQuest
programme.desc: Large and dangerous cats are stalking suburban neighbourhoods throughout the United States. The MonsterQuest investigation team goes undercover to examine evidence and eyewitness accounts to reveal the identity of this beast before it kills again.

programme.title: Project Impossible
programme.desc: In the past 50 years, the worlds energy use has doubled. In the next 50 years, it will double again. Can we keep up with demand - or will we plunge into darkness? Across the world, engineers are going to extreme lengths to keep the lights on: harnessing the power of the longest river on Earth, tapping into the raging heat of a live volcano, and building one of the largest offshore wind facilities in the world. This is Project Impossible: Battling the Blackout.

programme.title: UFO Files
programme.desc: In the search for life beyond our planet, this documentary investigates areas on earth that are said to have had UFO activity, conspiracy theories and phenomenons. Interviewing a variety of scientists and experts on UFOs and examining when possible evidence can prove or suggest anything towards super natural life. From going off of tales that have been told and spread through generations and or cultures to personal experiences where sighting have occurred the series covers the super natural phenomenon that is life beyond earth.

programme.title: UFO Files
programme.desc: In the search for life beyond our planet, this documentary investigates areas on earth that are said to have had UFO activity, conspiracy theories and phenomenons. Interviewing a variety of scientists and experts on UFOs and examining when possible evidence can prove or suggest anything towards super natural life. From going off of tales that have been told and spread through generations and or cultures to personal experiences where sighting have occurred the series covers the super natural phenomenon that is life beyond earth.

programme.title: The Hunt for Baltic Gold
programme.desc: Amber has been coveted in Poland since the 15th century, when handmade jewellery incorporating this semi-precious stone (even though it is not a stone) was sought after by members of the Royal, Imperial, Papal and Ottoman Courts. With 70% of the worlds amber being produced in Poland, the industry is still thriving, especially in the coastal areas around the port city of Gdansk. The viewer will learn about the journey of amber, from its origins as fossilized tree resin to its extraction from the ground and its transfromation into creative and beautiful decorations. The show also tells the story of the people who work in the industry and the difficulties they face in harvesting the amber, getting it to market and selling it.

programme.title: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: Documentary series that brings back to life lost cities, structures, cultures, and civilisations, transporting viewers back in time and revealing the truth behind some of historys most iconic eras. Using a combination of cutting-edge technology and archaeological research, the team detail what life was like for these places during their peak of their powers, and use visual overlays to compare past and present landscapes. From the Knights Templar to the lost city of Atlantis, ancient Egypt to Hitlers planned supercity, and ancient Athens to Americas wild west, each episodes dives into these extraordinary remnants of human history.

programme.title: Cities of the Underworld
programme.desc: In major cities around the world today, skyscrapers loom overhead, taxis honk their horns and street vendors peddle their wares. But below lies city upon city - each with its fascinating and unknown history. This series will explore these layers, which are often hundreds of feet deep, and examine a citys ancient cisterns, dank dungeons, eerie tombs, clandestine hideouts, and even underground shipwrecks that have been lost for hundreds and hundreds of years. What are the underground layers of the most populated cities on earth? And how did (and do) engineers build layer upon layer up to todays city streets? This series will reveal the technological marvels that allowed the construction of one city upon another - literally.

programme.title: Evolve
programme.desc: Throughout the eons of its existence, the natural world has played host to this never-ending competition called life. Since the dawn of time, roughly 99 percent of all species have become extinct. In order to survive, all creatures, including man, must treat life as a battlefield and master the natural weapons and defenses that they have evolved: Tyrannosaurus Rexs 13-inch canines; the Geckos velcro-like toe pads; the Bald Eagles telescopic vision capable of spotting a hare a mile away. How did these attributes, each unique to the organism itself, appear? Certainly not arbitrarily. They evolved for a common reason - to give these animals a critical edge in inter-species warfare, and to ensure the survival of the individuals genes into the next generation. To evolve is to survive!

programme.title: Engineering an Empire
programme.desc: In an era long passed, mighty empires were forged from nothing and rose to the heights of power. Join host Peter Weller, an actor and a professor at Syracuse University as he travels the world to show the engineering feats that gave rise to some of the greatest civilizations known to man. From Rome to the Pharaohs Egypt, from Greece to Carthage, from the Aztecs to the Maya and more, this new program from the History Channel uses computer graphics to explore the architectural, political and cultural glory of the worlds greatest empires.

programme.title: Serial Killer Earth
programme.desc: In recent years the destructive power of natural disasters has been recorded, from Hurricane Katrina to the earthquake and tsunami that devastated Japan. Serial Killer Earth brings together a top team of experts to examine the most compelling footage from news and home video, as well as eyewitness testimony, in order to explain, understand and inform viewers of what actually happened during these disasters and how they compare and contrast with the most historic natural disasters of the past.

programme.title: The Curse of Civil War Gold
programme.desc: Treasure hunters Rick and Marty Lagina, the stars of Historys "The Curse of Oak Island," learn of a new mystery that may even rival Oak Islands. Michigan native Kevin Dykstra is obsessed with a deathbed confession made by a lighthouse keeper in the 1890s about a national treasure dating back to the Civil War. The story goes that Union soldiers tracked down Confederate president Jefferson Davis in 1865 and confiscated his gold. The stolen loot was smuggled north some years later but ended up in Lake Michigan, where Dykstra believes it still remains. His quest to prove it ultimately takes him and his team to the bottom of Lake Michigan.

programme.title: Shy Asian Hotwife Rides Black Rod
programme.desc: My sweet Asian wife was a little nervous for her first hotwife experience with this black stud, but a gentle massage quickly turned to deep plowing!

programme.title: Two Rods Thrust 3Way 18YOs!
programme.desc: Luciani, Candie; Cute, Sarah

programme.title: Young Wives 3Way Affairs!

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Investigation Discovery and People magazine partner to re-examine some of the most high profile crime cases in recent history. The one-hour series brings viewers tales of betrayal, buried secrets and unsung heroes, ripped from the pages of one of the nations top weekly magazines. These stories transcended news and became part of pop culture, revealing shocking twists, new evidence, and unexpected resolutions. Interlaced within every episode are exclusive interviews with Peoples journalists, archival footage, re-creations, and firsthand accounts by those closest to the investigations.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: A person suddenly and unexpectedly disappears; no trace, no clues, nothing but the lingering mystery they leave behind. According to the FBIs National Crime Information Center, there are now 110,484 active missing persons cases in the U.S., 53% are juveniles under the age of 18. Most of us have heard of the high-profile cases, such as Natalee Holloway, Stacey Peterson, and Chandra Levy. But have you ever heard of Mae Catherine Rocker, Alexis Peterson or Thomas Jay Kerr? Probably not. They are just a few of the hundreds of thousands of people in this country who one day, simply Disappeared. Most missing persons stories have never been told...until now. Disappeared is an exciting series that investigates the disappearance of these victims, who are here one minute, gone the next. Each episode focuses on one victims story, as told through the perspectives and actual voices of their closest friends and family and the investigators trying to solve the case. Through interviews with family, friends, police, and searchers, each episode recounts the actions, thoughts, circumstances and motivations that led to each persons disappearance. Experience the victims final hours until they vanished. Watch interviews with experts, from psychologists to forensic specialists to psychics, who will offer new insights into what may have happened in each case, whether the person was a victim of foul play or a runaway. Disappeared will take you inside the world of the missing, where a person can vanish without a trace, investigators race against the clock to solve a mystery, and the victims anguished family and friends are left to wonder what in the world could have happened.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: Documentary series following police officers across the USA as they put their lives on the line to enforce the law. Using real footage from the officers body cameras, we show just how deadly routine checks can be, with law enforcement officials having to think on their feet and make split-second decisions to potentially save their, or someone elses, life. From knife-wielding maniacs to brutal shootouts, the series highlights the importance of our police departments. With interviews from the officers involved adding context to the footage, Body Cam Cops gives viewers unprecedented, exclusive access to what life is truly like in the line of duty.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath

programme.title: Murder In the Heartland
programme.desc: This series focuses on the dark underbelly of the American mid-west, its heartland. Each episode deals with a specific murder thats been commited in one of the small towns that make up this iconic region of the US with the locals enhancing the tales and bringing clues to our attention. The show includes interviews with the victims family, friends, law enforcement officers and also provides dramatic reenactments to bring the stories to life. Episodes reveal true stories such as when an Oklahoma familys dog drops a human skull onto their porch and the police are called in to investigate; a bride-to-be who discovers her betrothed shot in the head in their living room; a beloved father, son and fiancee who is discovered beaten to death in his own driveway; and a devoted family man who diappears after his truck is set on fire.

Believing that by spending time isolated within a haunted location for a longer period of time than most paranormal shows will bring them closer to communication with the spirits that may be haunting these locations.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown UK

programme.desc: Crime documentary series hosted by Aphrodite Jones who looks into real-life crimes including some of the most atrocious murders of recent times. programme.desc: The powerful Murdaugh family has held sway over the South Carolina "low country" for a century - until now. Alleged murder, corruption, and deception are revealed. Meanwhile Alex Murdaugh, 4th generation of the legal dynasty, stands accused of enough financial crimes to sentence him to more than 700 years in prison... and the saga continues.

programme.title: Deadly Sins
programme.desc: Horrifying true stories of individuals who committed some of the most shocking crimes led by basic human instincts and the seven deadly sins. Criminal behaviour expert Darren Kavinoky offers his professional analysis of each case. The intriguing and suspenseful stories are told using dramatic reenactments. Discover what happens when wrath, greed, sloth, pride, lust, envy and gluttony take over.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: Deadly Dynasty
programme.desc: The powerful Murdaugh family has held sway over the South Carolina "low country" for a century - until now. Alleged murder, corruption, and deception are revealed. Meanwhile Alex Murdaugh, 4th generation of the legal dynasty, stands accused of enough financial crimes to sentence him to more than 700 years in prison... and the saga continues.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: Deadly Dynasty
programme.desc: The powerful Murdaugh family has held sway over the South Carolina "low country" for a century - until now. Alleged murder, corruption, and deception are revealed. Meanwhile Alex Murdaugh, 4th generation of the legal dynasty, stands accused of enough financial crimes to sentence him to more than 700 years in prison... and the saga continues.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: Deadly Dynasty
programme.desc: The powerful Murdaugh family has held sway over the South Carolina "low country" for a century - until now. Alleged murder, corruption, and deception are revealed. Meanwhile Alex Murdaugh, 4th generation of the legal dynasty, stands accused of enough financial crimes to sentence him to more than 700 years in prison... and the saga continues.

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones
programme.desc: Crime documentary series hosted by Aphrodite Jones who looks into real-life crimes including some of the most atrocious murders of recent times. Jones shares details of these gruesome crimes alongside authentic footage, evidence and interviews with people associated to the case – sometimes even the perpetrator themselves. Subjects featured in the series include such high-profile cases as O. J. Simpson, Michael Jackson, the notorious Zodiac serial killer and the music producer Phil Spector. Jones attempts to get inside the minds of her subjects to better understand their motives for committing such unspeakable crimes. Aphrodite Jones is a true-crime expert, a former crime reporter for FOX News and the author of eight books.

programme.title: Переживу
programme.desc: Женя Мильковский, родившийся под Донецком, основал группу "Нервы" в Киеве в 2010 году. Группа получила большую популярность в Украине и России. Однако с началом войны музыканты прекратили деятельность в России и переехали в Грузию. Там они подружились с рэпером FACE и группой "Порнофильмы", после чего все три коллектива отправились в совместный тур в поддержку Украины под лозунгом Stand with Ukraine. Съёмки фильма происходили в ноябре 2022 года. К моменту выхода фильма все музыканты группы "Нервы" покинули Россию и переехали в Грузию.

programme.title: Детали
programme.desc: Как улучшить движение, если на дорогах только автоматический транспорт? Бионический протез управляется при помощи мышечных импульсов. Ученые нашли способ предсказать, кто в пожилом возрасте заболеет болезнью Альцгеймера. Миниатюрные роботы-насекомые.

programme.title: Детали
programme.desc: Eженедельный телевизионный проект Русской службы "Голоса Америки", в котором ведущий Андрей Деркач рассказывает о научных открытиях и высокотехнологичных разработках в таких сферах, как медицина, космос, информационные технологии. Корреспонденты программы на себе испытывают новинки рынка hi-tech, общаются с создателями всего того, что делает нашу жизнь интереснее, безопаснее и удобнее.

programme.title: Детали
programme.desc: В образцах пород с астероида Бенну, добытые аппаратом OSIRIS-REx, нашли воду и углерод — "кирпичики земной жизни". Искусственный интеллект проектирует шагающих роботов. Скамейки из бутылок: необычный проект из Кении по использованию пластикового мусора.

programme.title: Я обещаю молчать
programme.desc: Взрослую жизнь Даши трудно назвать счастливой — мать уговорила её выйти за Игоря, сына своей подруги, который пьёт и распускает руки. Ей уже за тридцать, а ни карьеры, ни настоящей любви, ни детей у неё нет. В студенческие годы она оставила в роддоме девочку и с тех пор живёт с чувством вины. Но в один момент Даша решает всё изменить — она увольняется с работы, уходит от мужа и отправляется на поиски своей дочери. Девочку удочерили супруги Савины — Алексей и Ирина. Они назвали её Машей. Даша устраивается гувернанткой в их дом. Вскоре выясняется, что Ирина неизлечимо больна, и она берёт с Даши слово, что Маша никогда не узнает правду о своём рождении.

programme.title: Я обещаю молчать
programme.desc: Взрослую жизнь Даши трудно назвать счастливой — мать уговорила её выйти за Игоря, сына своей подруги, который пьёт и распускает руки. Ей уже за тридцать, а ни карьеры, ни настоящей любви, ни детей у неё нет. В студенческие годы она оставила в роддоме девочку и с тех пор живёт с чувством вины. Но в один момент Даша решает всё изменить — она увольняется с работы, уходит от мужа и отправляется на поиски своей дочери. Девочку удочерили супруги Савины — Алексей и Ирина. Они назвали её Машей. Даша устраивается гувернанткой в их дом. Вскоре выясняется, что Ирина неизлечимо больна, и она берёт с Даши слово, что Маша никогда не узнает правду о своём рождении.

programme.title: Пять минут тишины
programme.desc: К Саше без предупреждения приезжает Лина, которая накануне заявила о разрыве. Грек оказывается в неловком положении, поскольку уже начал ухаживать за Таней. Девушка просится оставить ее на базе, чтобы побыть с женихом, и пробует выяснить отношения. В этот момент поступает вызов о пожаре в лесу. В районе возгорания находятся приехавшие на пикник мэр города с подчиненными. Всем кроме мэра удается выбраться, а вот градоначальник в панике попадает в огненное кольцо. Спасатели разделяются и продолжают поиски. Одному из них удается найти мэра, но, получив травму ноги, он не может вывести мужчину и зовет на помощь…

programme.title: Пять минут тишины
programme.desc: Двое студентов приезжают в Карелию на поиски клада с изумрудами, якобы спрятанного здесь в одной из шахт еще в XIX веке. Хозяин дома, где они останавливаются на ночлег, подслушивает их разговор и направляется за ними в лес, чтобы отобрать карту. Вскоре в полицию поступает тревожный вызов от одного из студентов, который просит о помощи. Юноша успевает сообщить, что в лесу его с товарищем преследует вооруженный мужчина, но убежать вдвоем они не могут — друг сломал ногу. Дежурный, определив примерное местоположение студентов, связывается со спасателями.

programme.title: Балтия
programme.desc: Еженедельная информационная программа "Балтия" – непредвзятый взгляд на происходящее в Эстонии, Латвии и Литве. События, явления и люди в репортажах корреспондентов Настоящего Времени, работающих в регионе. Точная и беспристрастная информация, все точки зрения о происходящем в каждой из трех стран, входящих в Евросоюз и военный блок НАТО.

programme.title: Европейские ценности
programme.desc: Недавно Хорватия стала полноправным членом ЕС и уже впечатляет быстрыми темпами внедрения солнечной энергетики. В стране появляются школы, которые полностью обеспечивают себя энергией и даже передают излишки в общегосударственную сеть. Граждане активно поддерживают экологические инициативы, а правительство оперативно адаптирует законы для их реализации. Как маленькой стране удаётся так быстро двигаться к "зелёному" будущему? Мы решили разобраться в этом феномене хорватской народной энергетики — возможно, здесь действительно есть чему поучиться.

programme.title: Экстрасенсы ведут расследование
programme.desc: Татьяна - обычная, милая девушка - хорошая мать, любящая жена, заботливая дочь. Но это только на первый взгляд, стоит вам с ней поссориться, как в жизни начнут происходить самые неприятные вещи. И это касается абсолютно всех. Медиум Александр Шепс и сибирская ведьма Елена Голунова попробуют разобраться в происходящем.

programme.title: Экстрасенсы ведут расследование
programme.desc: 6 сезон шоу "Экстрасенсы ведут расследование", в котором люди со сверхспособностями помогают полиции и частным детективам найти ответы на сложные вопросы, раскрыть настоящие преступления и докопаться до истины.

programme.title: Экстрасенсы ведут расследование
programme.desc: Обычно эти люди не любят камер и публичности, но для шоу "Экстрасенсы ведут расследование" даже принципиальные затворники готовы сделать исключение, ведь речь идет о реальной помощи.

programme.title: В поисках капитана Гранта
programme.desc: Капитан Грант пустился в опасное плавание, чтобы основать вольное шотландское поселение на островах Тихого океана. Но его корабль терпит крушение, и лишь полуразмытая записка в бутылке доносит обрывочные сведения о Гранте. Лорд Гленарван на свой страх и риск отправляется на поиски, взяв с собой детей капитана — Мэри и Роберта. Путь отважных путешественников лежит через острова Атлантики, горы и пампасы Новой Зеландии и Австралии, просторы Тихого океана, где их поджидают всевозможные приключения.

programme.title: Лев Яшин. Вратарь моей мечты
programme.desc: Молодой вратарь команды "Динамо" Лев Яшин заменил знаменитого Хомича и пропустил мяч в пустые ворота. С этого момента он понял, что с одним талантом далеко не продвинешься. Талантливому спортсмену предстоит много работать и даже его желание быть нападающим, будет играть на молниеносную реакцию вратаря, которого признают лучшим в мире. Он первым получит "Золотой мяч" из голкиперов и советских футболистов. Всю спортивную жизнь он будет играть за одну команду - "Динамо", а в составе сборной СССР станет чемпионом Олимпиады-1956 года.

programme.title: Сибирь. Монамур
programme.desc: Сибирь. В тайге, в брошенной деревне старик с внуком ждут отца мальчика, который вряд ли вернется. Муж с женой растят трех дочерей, и это единственное, что их еще связывает. Прошедший две кавказские войны капитан пытается найти свое место в мирной жизни. Судьбы этих героев переплетаются неожиданно и драматично. Им нужно снова и снова делать свой выбор, открывая в себе забытую человечность и сострадание. Милосердие выше справедливости.

programme.title: Пространство музыки
programme.desc: 4 друга отправляются в Великобританию на поиски будущих звезд мировой музыки. Концертные площадки, студии, репетиционные базы, фестивали, клубы и улицы. На пути от Ливерпуля до Лондона они записывают уникальные истории талантливых молодых музыкантов и их живые выступления на фоне самого музыкального пространства мира.

programme.title: Детали
programme.desc: В Питтсбурге разработали умного робота, который помогает одеваться. Расскажем, какие технологии будут помогать увеличивать популяцию людей на других планетах. Узнаем, что происходит с микрофлорой человека после его смерти.

programme.title: Детали
programme.desc: Eженедельный телевизионный проект Русской службы "Голоса Америки", в котором ведущий Андрей Деркач рассказывает о научных открытиях и высокотехнологичных разработках в таких сферах, как медицина, космос, информационные технологии. Корреспонденты программы на себе испытывают новинки рынка hi-tech, общаются с создателями всего того, что делает нашу жизнь интереснее, безопаснее и удобнее.

programme.title: Детали
programme.desc: Голод замедляет старение организма человека. Специальная капсула позволяет выращивать растения в космосе. Нанороботы размером не более наперстка, которые могут работать бесконечно долго. Высокотехнологичный чехол для слабовидящих владельцев смартфонов.

programme.title: Я обещаю молчать
programme.desc: Взрослую жизнь Даши трудно назвать счастливой — мать уговорила её выйти за Игоря, сына своей подруги, который пьёт и распускает руки. Даша устраивается гувернанткой в их дом. Вскоре выясняется, что Ирина неизлечимо больна, и она берёт с Даши слово, что Маша никогда не узнает правду о своём рождении.

programme.desc: Взрослую жизнь Даши трудно назвать счастливой — мать уговорила её выйти за Игоря, сына своей подруги, который пьёт и распускает руки.
